tasks.title: Scaffold project structure
tasks.description: Project scaffolded by new-project.sh. Coordinator, config, server, and initial test are in place.

tasks.title: Add health check tool and /health custom route
tasks.description: Create tools/health.py with a health_check MCP tool that returns server status, version, and uptime. Also add a GET /health custom route on the FastMCP server for Cloud Run liveness/readiness probes. Write tests first in tests/tools/test_health.py. The health tool should return a Pydantic model (HealthStatus) defined in models/schemas.py. The /health route should return JSON {"status": "ok"}.

tasks.title: Add config validation and environment tests
tasks.description: Write comprehensive tests for config.py in tests/test_config.py. Test default values, environment variable overrides (using monkeypatch), transport type validation, and the settings singleton. Ensure all Settings fields have sensible defaults and that invalid transport types raise validation errors.

tasks.title: Pass lint, format, and type checks cleanly
tasks.description: Run 'make lint', 'make format', and 'make type-check'. Fix any ruff warnings, formatting issues, or mypy errors across the entire codebase. All three commands must exit with code 0. Do not change behavior — only fix style, types, and lint issues.

verification.test_command: uv run ruff check . && uv run mypy <!-- CUSTOMIZE: package_name -->/ && uv run pytest tests/ -v
